Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 
130 
GAP_MOPP_COINS_1M 
LABEL: 
Gap Coinsurance Split Network Preferred Mail Order — One-Month Supply 
DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-insurance percentage for a one-month supply of the drugs 
on this tier, using a mail order preferred pharmacy (MOPP) during the coverage gap phase of the Part 
D benefit. 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
12 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS
